poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

instanceId.description: Stable identifier of the instance being replaced.

instanceName.description: Display name or hostname for the instance being replaced.

replacementInstanceId.description: Stable identifier of the replacement instance.

replacementInstanceName.description: Display name or hostname for the replacement instance.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this lifecycle event, such as reimage reason or host migration context.
